title: Login page not loading
description: Users are unable to access the login page. The page shows a blank screen after navigating to the login URL. This issue started after the latest deployment.

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: Customers are experiencing payment timeouts when trying to complete purchases. The issue occurs during the final checkout step and no payment is being processed.

title: Profile picture upload fails
description: When users attempt to upload a new profile picture, they receive an error 413 (Payload Too Large). Even small images below 1MB are getting rejected.

title: Email notifications not sent
description: Automated email notifications for password resets and order confirmations are not being delivered to customers. The mail server logs show no outgoing messages.

title: Dashboard charts broken
description: The analytics charts on the admin dashboard are not rendering correctly. The data is present but the visual charts show as empty containers.

title: Search returns no results
description: The product search feature is returning zero results for all queries. Users have confirmed that the search terms match existing products in the catalog.

title: Password reset link expired
description: Customers are receiving password reset emails but the links expire within minutes instead of the expected 24-hour window. Multiple users affected.

title: Mobile app crashes on startup
description: The iOS mobile app crashes immediately upon launching after the latest update (v3.2.1). Android users are unaffected. Rollback has been requested.

title: Slow page load time report
description: Several customers have reported that product listing pages are taking over 10 seconds to load. Performance degradation started after the CDN migration last week.

title: Order history missing
description: Customers cannot view their past orders in the account section. The order history page loads but shows an empty list despite confirmed purchases.

title: Two-factor auth not working
description: The SMS-based two-factor authentication codes are not being received by users. The feature was working fine until the telephony provider was switched.

title: Coupon code validation error
description: Valid promotional coupon codes are being rejected at checkout with 'Invalid code' error. The codes are confirmed active in the admin panel.
